Description: Health check endpoint. Returns server port status and routes.
Register/configure a new housing society with blocks flat layout and admin credentials.
Admin Login. Validates admin username and password. Returns society data and JWT token.
Resident Login. Validates resident username and password. Returns flat/block info and JWT token.
Fetch all registered society names for the landing page dropdown.
Verifies society + flat + phone. Generates 6-digit OTP and sends it via Twilio SMS.
Validates OTP then updates resident username and/or password.
Verifies admin username + Chairman phone. Sends OTP to Chairman via SMS.
Validates OTP sent to Chairman.
Updates admin username and password after OTP verification.
Fetch all society data: flats residents bank info notices expenses committee rules complaints.
EDIT FLAT DETAILS FORM. Saves owner name phone tenant info resident credentials payment status plan and ownership transfer.
MARK AS PAID QUICK BUTTON. One-click marks a flat's current month maintenance as Paid with today's date.
Add a new expense or update an existing one (title amount date notes).
Delete a specific expense record by ID.
Create or update a general society notice/announcement.
Delete a specific notice by ID.
Add or update a society rule (stored internally as a notice with _rule_ prefix).
Delete a specific society rule by ID.
Log a new complaint from a flat or ADMIN or update an existing complaint.
Delete a specific complaint by ID.
Register a new committee member (name role phone) for the society.
Remove a committee member by ID.
Save or update bank details (bank name account number IFSC QR code image).
Send bulk WhatsApp/SMS reminders to all residents via Twilio. Falls back to SMS if WhatsApp fails.
Update the society's default due day for monthly maintenance invoices.

Called From: Port on which the Express server runs.
Secret key for signing and verifying JWT auth tokens. Must be changed in production.
Maximum simultaneous database connections in the pool.
Set to true in environment to enable SSL (rejectUnauthorized: true).
Twilio Account SID for accessing the Twilio API client.
Twilio Auth Token for authenticating the API client.
Twilio Messaging Service SID used for sending SMS and WhatsApp messages.
